title: Few questions
wikitext:
[]: Few questions             Quote Post by evils_death » Tue Mar 17, 2009 1:12 am Hey, I'm new here and tried reading through the information because its just TOO LONG, includes too much discussion about symbolism (which I do not care about) and has too many half-cooked theories that does not seem correct. I understand there's many angles we can see Eva from, but please give your 2 cents. 1. what role did Asuka have in EoE? This one's because I remember Gendo saying something along the lines of "we can't lose unit-02) against arael, although that could've merely been an excuse to use the lance. 2. In rebuild, Gendo says something along the lines of "get Rei close to Shinji." Now I look back on it, this is also exactly what he did in the original series. Maybe he planned Rei to betray him :O? 3. Importance of Kaji? Aside from the obvious, he doesn't seem to do much of importance. However, during Zeruel's attack, was he waiting there for Shinji to stumble upon him? If so, why? 4. When the entry plugs malfunction/ some other technological error happens, is it genuine or Gendo Ikari pulling strings from behind? 5. Unit-00 = ai similar to magi computer?

[]: Re: Few questions             Quote Post by Duke » Tue Mar 17, 2009 1:24 am evils_death wrote: 1. what role did Asuka have in EoE? This one's because I remember Gendo saying something along the lines of "we can't lose unit-02) against arael, although that could've merely been an excuse to use the lance.

[]:             Quote Post by evils_death » Tue Mar 17, 2009 1:57 am 1. Huh? I do not understand why Eva-02 is needed for Instrumentality? Also although she has her merits holding off the attackers, is that really all she’s there for? 2. Agreed, however, is that all Rei is for? And while I’m sure Rei was important during Instrumentality, what did she actually do? I mean, even without her, it is still possible to continue instrumentality. 3. Yeh, I agree, but I do not get what is the point of helping BOTH sides? 4. Before I asked this question, I should have asked is it possible for eva to run without a pilot if in berserk? I mean, sachiel was defeated BECAUSE they was unable to get Shinji out of there 5. Well, it is confirmed what souls unit-01 and unit-02 have, but what about unit-00? I remember Misato saying something like “this is the same technology used in eva” (referring to magi computers), so I hazard a guess that unit-00 was a computer Yui (it was said that unit-00 and unit-01 is similar, and this is the only explanation I can think of). Makes a bit of sense, as unit-00 is a prototype a soul in a robot is not a natural conclusion that scientists will think of.

[]: Re: Few questions             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Tue Mar 17, 2009 2:42 am >1. what role did Asuka have in EoE? Sacrifice/casualty. We don't know what Team Soryu's role would have been if SEELE hadn't pre-empted Gendo's launch of 3I >2. "get Rei close to Shinji." Given that this backfires in the end as Rei abandons Gendo in favour of Shinji, it's really not clear what his motivation was in that scene >3. Importance of Kaji? Shinji's aniki (only without the groovy shades) >4. When the entry plugs malfunction It depends -- episode 17 is enemy action; episode 19 is Yui getting stroppy >5. Unit-00 = ai similar to magi computer? Something akin to Rei (see Shinji's experiences while synching EVA-00 in episode 14); assumption -- another fragment of Lilith's soul.

[]:             Quote Post by evils_death » Tue Mar 17, 2009 3:30 am 1. Ah, good point. The invasion may have screwed up Gendo's plan... probably wasn't expecting the MPE to be completed so quickly... 2. Maybe he wanted it to to backfire... :O Ok, bit of a stretch, especially with the speech with Yui... 3. I see... so he may not be as much of a main character as some people perceived him to be... still, I do not get his motivation... 4. Yeh, but I guess they don't fail randomly, like what some believe.. 5. Damn, didn't think of this. I guess a major clue was that Asuka's mother soul also split, so this is very possible. However, if this is true, then unit-00's beserker mode before Sachiel is interesting... maybe it was Gendo's plan :P (the main way of getting Rei close to Shinji was to get Rei on talking terms with himself, and the main way of getting Shinji to pilot was showing him the half-dead Rei. Still makes my theory improbable, but still...)

[]:             Quote Post by ZapX » Tue Mar 17, 2009 5:33 am 1) Eye candy, fap material (for people in real life and the Eva universe). 2) He was trying to get his son laid. He is the überpimp after all and Rei is one of his finest ladies. 3) Dude likes melons. Shinji just caught him at the right time. 4) If you watch episode 11 you can see him clearly pulling the strings on the entry plug. 5) Yes, Unit-00 has similar love to the MAGI.

[]: Why Gendo wants Rei and Shinji to draw closer.             Quote Post by rberlin » Tue Mar 17, 2009 1:05 pm In Rebuild, Seele is going to try to start 3rd Impact by getting a human and an angel to fall in love. Seele is planning on using Captian Shikinami and Kaworu and hoping love will bloom on the battlefield in their war against the Angels. Of course Gendo has plans of his own and is getting Rei and Shinji closer together in a race against Seele to see which couple falls in love first. But the scorned Naoko Akagi, after faking her suicide and well aware of the sinister plans of both Keel and Gendo has trained Gendo's own illegitimate daughter Mari, the product of their affair, to infiltrate Nerve with the help of a loyal splinter group of former Gehern members including Kaji and Aoba, and steal Shinji and Kaworu's attention.

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Tue Mar 17, 2009 1:17 pm ^ Anno would totally do something like this.

[]:             Quote Post by IrkenEvangelion » Tue Mar 17, 2009 2:08 pm ^^ After the first paragraph I stopped reading and went out to shoot something. AKA.... NO

[]: Re: Why Gendo wants Rei and Shinji to draw closer.             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Tue Mar 17, 2009 3:33 pm rberlin wrote: Seele is planning on using Captian Shikinami and Kaworu and hoping love will bloom on the battlefield in their war against the Angels.

[]:             Quote Post by xfactor30seconds » Tue Mar 17, 2009 6:31 pm 1. what role did Asuka have in EoE? It's because all the evangelions were essential in finishing the instrumentality project. 2. In rebuild, Gendo says something along the lines of "get Rei close to Shinji." sorry i didnt see rebuild 3. Importance of Kaji? He tells Misato stuff so she tells Shinji basically he informs the people who were left out and changes their thinking from that point on. 4. When the entry plugs malfunction/ some other technological error happens sometimes sometimes its SEELE for example EOE Gendo didnt plan for the committee to decide to just start instrumentality but because its Gendo he didnt completely rule it out. 5. Unit-00 = ai similar to magi computer? i dont understand the question srry

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Wed Mar 18, 2009 2:30 am xfactor30seconds wrote: 5. Unit-00 = ai similar to magi computer? i dont understand the question srry

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Wed Mar 18, 2009 12:21 pm Gendo doesn't say anything about protecting Eva-02 during Arael's attack, he's protecting Eva-01 because it's part of his plan, aside from Rei, the other pawns are expendable: Episode 22 wrote: Misato: Should we transport Unit 00 into the air and snipe it from there? No, that won't work. It'll all be over if we get shot down on the approach. Shinji (RADIO - OFF): I'll go out there in Unit 01! FUYUTSUKI: No! The target corrodes the pilot's psyche. IKARI: Right now, we must avoid the corrosion of Unit 01. Shinji: Then I just have to keep from getting hit, right?! IKARI: Your success is not guaranteed. Shinji: But at this rate, Asuka will... IKARI: I don't care. Rei, go down into Dogma and use the Lance.

[]: Re: Why Gendo wants Rei and Shinji to draw closer.             Quote Post by THE Hal E. Burton 9000 » Wed Mar 18, 2009 1:15 pm rberlin wrote: In Rebuild, Seele is going to try to start 3rd Impact by getting a human and an angel to fall in love. Seele is planning on using Captian Shikinami and Kaworu and hoping love will bloom on the battlefield in their war against the Angels. Of course Gendo has plans of his own and is getting Rei and Shinji closer together in a race against Seele to see which couple falls in love first. But the scorned Naoko Akagi, after faking her suicide and well aware of the sinister plans of both Keel and Gendo has trained Gendo's own illegitimate daughter Mari, the product of their affair, to infiltrate Nerve with the help of a loyal splinter group of former Gehern members including Kaji and Aoba, and steal Shinji and Kaworu's attention.

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Wed Mar 18, 2009 2:40 pm In Rebuild, Seele is going to try to start 3rd Impact by getting a human and an angel to fall in love. Seele is planning on using Captian Shikinami and Kaworu and hoping love will bloom on the battlefield in their war against the Angels.

[]:             Quote Post by master_lloyd » Wed Mar 18, 2009 3:36 pm Which in this scenario allows Shinji to indulge in incest with both his mother and his half-sister. Good times.

[]:             Quote Post by Twsa'teotu » Wed Mar 18, 2009 3:39 pm Kaji is a triple agent working for the Japanese national government. Seele thinks he's spying on Gendo for them, while Gendo thinks Kaji is *his* spy....really he's playing them against each other ***Kaji really just personally wants to take down Seele and Nerv and learn "the Truth"....his goals happen to coincide with that of the Japanese government's intelligence branch, so they work together. But it's not out of national loyalty or anything. The idea they only make clear in deleted scenes, is that Kaji stole Adam from Seele in episode 8 (he must have faked it because they only realize he's stolen such a valuable item by episode 21) Seele sent Kaji to Nerv to spy on Gendo....meanwhile, Gendo thought he was a double-agent, because he apparently betrayed Seele to give Gendo Adam it turns out he's a TRIPLE agent, because he only stole Adam from Seele to gain Gendo's trust, when he was really investigating Nerv's inner secrets...not for Seele, but for the Japanese government. This culminates in him finding out about Lilith and Terminal Dogma, and that the supposed "candidate screenings" by the Marduk Institute are fake and they're really hand-picked by Nerv and put in Class 2-A for safe-keeping As for Kaji's death, well he kidnapped Fuyutsuki because Seele demanded it, but apparently he set him free because Kaji found out that Seele discovered he had stolen Adam, and he would be killed soon. They didn't bother to re-kidnap Fuyutski, because they wanted to be able to threaten Gendo that they could "replace" him with Fuyutski if they needed to, so they could kill Gendo if they wanted and still have Nerv function. In the long run, Kaji's role in the meta-arc is that while he died for snooping around too much, he passed on his knowledge to Misato, so that she knows what's going on by End of Eva, which starts with her using the info Kaji gave her to crack into Gendo's most secret files.

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Thu Mar 19, 2009 11:46 am But it turns out all of that was wrong, and he was completely loyal the whole time. How does this work? Because Ryoji...is actually Kaworu. Being killed by a mere bullet caused him to merely regenerate Time Lord style. He was trying to romance Misato to get the only witness of Second Impact out of the way.

[]:             Quote Post by GVman » Sat Mar 21, 2009 8:29 pm And the souls in the EVAs aren't their mothers. Instead, its the souls deceased hot-blooded super robot pilots Domon Kasshu, Ryoma Nagare, and Guy Shishio. It's blatantly stated in every single line of dialogue, but the letters are scrambled.

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Sun Mar 22, 2009 11:22 am Or alternatively, Domon, Ryoma, and Guy ARE their mothers!

I understand there's many angles we can see Eva from, but please give your 2 cents. 1. what role did Asuka have in EoE?

Article: Few questions
 really hand-picked by Nerv and put in Class 2-A for safe-keeping As for Kaji's death, well he kidnapped Fuyutsuki because Seele demanded it, but apparently he set him free because Kaji found out that Seele discovered he had stolen Adam, and he would be killed soon.
